description_long: This is an adult female figure dressed in a formal school or office-inspired outfit, featuring a long-sleeved shirt with a collar and a necktie, paired with a pleated skirt. The figure has a medium build and stands upright with arms extended horizontally. The shoes are closed-toe with a slight heel, and the legs are bare. The hairstyle is a shoulder-length bob with a side part, giving a neat and tidy appearance. The overall look is professional and youthful, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or near educational institutions.
description: A standing adult female in a collared shirt, necktie, pleated skirt, and heeled shoes, with a shoulder-length bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, necktie, pleated skirt, and facial features clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight posture, and the side silhouette of the skirt and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, skirt, and hairstyle, with arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the side of the outfit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved collared shirt with necktie and pleated skirt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
